exec: pm.test("id property should have specific value", () => { pm.expect(jsonData["id"]).to.include("80"); })
pm.test("Returned response has only one element", () => { pm.expect(jsonData.length).to.equal(1); })
pm.test("id property should have specific value", () => { pm.expect(jsonData[0]["id"]).to.include("80"); })
pm.test("id property should have specific value", () => { pm.expect(jsonData["id"]).to.include("80"); })
pm.test("id property should have specific value", () => { pm.expect(jsonData["id"]).to.include("21856"); })
pm.test("id property should have specific value", () => { pm.expect(jsonData["id"]).to.include("1"); })
pm.test("id property should have specific value", () => { pm.expect(jsonData["id"]).to.include("3956"); })
